details.effect: Whenever a follower on your field evolves, give your leader [defense]+2. [fanfare] Select a [forestcraft] follower that costs 2 or less in your cemetery and put it into your EX area. It costs 2 less to play this turn.

Whenever an Officer follower is put onto your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. [act] [cost00]: You may summon an Officer follower that costs 2 or less from your hand or EX area. Activate only once per turn.

[fanfare] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. From among them, you may put up to 1 Mage follower that costs 3 or less and up to 1 Mage spell that costs 3 or less into your EX area. They cost 3 less to play this turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. Whenever you play a Mage card, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.

[fanfare] Recover 5 play points. [act] [engage]: Choose up to 2. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field. It can't attack enemies during its controller's next turn. (2) The next time 1 or more followers are put onto your field this turn, give one [attack]+1/[defense]+1. (3) Give your leader [defense]+2. (4) Draw a card.

[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. At the start of your end phase, if there are at least 3 other Vampire cards on your field, deal 3 damage to each enemy leader and give your leader [defense]+3.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field. If your leader has gained at least 4 defense this turn, destroy it and draw a card.
[fanfare] Draw a card. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower that costs 4 or less on the field. If this card wasn't put onto the field from hand, put the selected follower into its owner's EX area.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. During your turn, whenever this follower takes ability damage, change its [evolve] cost to 0 for the rest of the turn.
